people.name: Guodong Zhang
people.one_liner: xAI co-founder. Led Grok Code & Grok Imagine. Departed xAI March 2026.
people.spike_signal: xAI CO-FOUNDER who just departed. Led two flagship products. Active founding signal.

people.name: Vahid Kazemi
people.one_liner: Former xAI ML PhD. Left Feb 2026. Explicitly starting something new.
people.spike_signal: DEPARTED xAI. Direct quote: all AI labs building same thing, boring. Active founder.

people.name: Roland Gavrilescu
people.one_liner: Former xAI engineer. Left Nov 2025. Re-forming team with xAI alumni.
people.spike_signal: DEPARTED xAI. Building with other xAI alumni. Active founder.

people.name: Tianle Li
people.one_liner: MTS at xAI. Co-creator of LMArena/Chatbot Arena. Co-created Grok 4 Fast. Berkeley EECS.
people.spike_signal: Built THE LLM eval platform + shipped frontier post-training. Rare eval+shipping combo.

people.name: Jathushan Rajasegaran
people.one_liner: Malik PhD. 2300+ citations. xAI video team. Co-author CVPR+ICCV 2025. Sri Lankan.
people.spike_signal: 2300+ cites. Malik PhD. At xAI during exodus. If departs = strong co-founding signal.

people.name: Sehoon Kim
people.one_liner: MTS at xAI. PhD Berkeley (Keutzer). Created SqueezeLLM, KVQuant (10M context). MLCommons Rising Star.
people.spike_signal: Created SqueezeLLM + KVQuant. ML efficiency at xAI. MLCommons Rising Star.

people.name: Shubham Goel
people.one_liner: Malik PhD. IIT Bombay. 3D reconstruction. At xAI. Indian-origin.
people.spike_signal: IIT Bombay + Malik PhD + xAI. 3D reconstruction. Indian.

people.name: Himanshu Gaurav Singh
people.one_liner: PhD Berkeley (Abbeel + Malik). IIT Delhi. Robot learning from videos.
people.spike_signal: IIT Delhi + dual Abbeel+Malik PhD. Robot learning. Indian.

people.name: Anastasios Angelopoulos
people.one_liner: Postdoc Berkeley (Ion Stoica). Science paper. PhD under Jordan + Malik. Incoming Stanford faculty.
people.spike_signal: Published in Science. Jordan+Malik+Stoica lineage. Conformal prediction pioneer.

people.name: Ethan He
people.one_liner: Co-recruited from NVIDIA Cosmos to xAI. Led Cosmos development. CMU MS. Still at xAI.
people.spike_signal: Led NVIDIA Cosmos. If departs xAI = strongest Zeeshan co-founding signal.

people.name: Charlie Snell
people.one_liner: PhD Berkeley. First author of Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute (ICLR 2025 Oral, most-cited).
people.spike_signal: THE paper on test-time compute scaling. ICLR 2025 Oral. Dual lead of the paradigm.

people.name: Amrith Setlur
people.one_liner: PhD CMU. Co-first author on e3 with Matthew Yang. Closest collaborator.
people.spike_signal: Co-first author e3 (test-time compute). Most likely co-founder if Yang starts something. Indian.

people.name: Keller Jordan
people.one_liner: Independent researcher, Berkeley. Muon co-creator. NanoGPT speedrunning. Karpathy endorsed.
people.spike_signal: Created Muon optimizer. NanoGPT pioneer. Endorsed by Karpathy. Strong founder archetype.

people.name: Jeremy Bernstein
people.one_liner: ML researcher SF. Caltech PhD. Co-created modular duality theory. Building Modula library.
people.spike_signal: Most likely co-founder if Laker starts something. Modular duality co-creator.

people.name: Karan Dalal
people.one_liner: Stanford/Berkeley. Lead author TTT video paper. Core TTT group.
people.spike_signal: Lead author TTT video. Potential co-founder for TTT-based startup. Indian.

people.name: Xingyao Wang
people.one_liner: PhD UIUC (BLENDER Lab). Co-founded AllHands AI. NAACL 2024 Outstanding Paper.
people.spike_signal: PhD who co-founded AllHands AI. On leave. NAACL Outstanding Paper. Active founder.

people.name: Ritvik Kapila
people.one_liner: NeoSigma co-founder. IIT Delhi. Built 24T token dataset at Essential AI (Vaswani).
people.spike_signal: IIT Delhi + 24T token dataset at Essential AI. Pre-training complement to Gauri. Indian.

people.name: Varun Mohan
people.one_liner: CEO Windsurf (Codeium). Now DeepMind leading Antigravity. Built $2.4B exit.
people.spike_signal: Built Windsurf ($2.4B). If leaves Google = biggest event in AI coding. Indian.

people.name: Simran Arora
people.one_liner: PhD Stanford (Chris Re, Hazy Research). Foundation model systems. Indian.
people.spike_signal: Hazy Research PhD. Part of Re founder factory pipeline. Indian.

people.name: Deepak Pathak
people.one_liner: CMU professor. Co-founded Skild AI ($300M+ raised, $14B). Abbeel lineage.
people.spike_signal: Co-founded Skild AI ($300M+, robotics foundation models). Indian.

people.name: Soumith Chintala
people.one_liner: PyTorch co-creator. Departed Meta for Thinking Machines Lab Nov 2025.
people.spike_signal: PyTorch co-creator. Left Meta. Indian.

people.name: Aditya Ramesh
people.one_liner: VP Research OpenAI. Oversees robotics research. Indian-origin.
people.spike_signal: VP Research OpenAI. Indian. Key departure watch.

people.name: Kawin Ethayarajh
people.one_liner: Created KTO (ICML 2024 Spotlight). SHP in Llama-2. ICML 2022 Outstanding Paper. UChicago Booth professor. 3,200+ cites.
people.spike_signal: ICML Spotlight + Outstanding Paper. Created KTO. SHP in Llama-2. Indian (Sri Lankan Tamil).

people.name: Wei-Lin Chiang
people.one_liner: CEO Arena (LMArena). Built Chatbot Arena at Berkeley. Ion Stoica group.
people.spike_signal: Built Chatbot Arena. CEO. Ion Stoica network. Central LLM eval figure.

people.name: Akshat Bubna
people.one_liner: First Indian IOI gold medalist ever (2014). Co-Founder & CTO Modal ($1.1B, talks at $2.5B). MIT.
people.spike_signal: First Indian IOI gold. MIT. Co-founded Modal ($1.1B). Indian.
